component.name: clickhouse
component.title: ClickHouse
component.description: Interact with ClickHouse, the high-performance columnar OLAP database, for high-throughput ingestion and OLAP queries.
component.label: database,bigdata

client.description: The shared ClickHouse client to use for all endpoints, of type com.clickhouse.client.api.Client. When set, the endpoint-level connection options (serverUrl, username, password, ssl) are ignored.

lazyStartProducer.label: producer
lazyStartProducer.description: Whether the producer should be started lazy (on the first message). By starting lazy you can use this to allow CamelContext and routes to startup in situations where a producer may otherwise fail during starting and cause the route to fail being started. By deferring this startup to be lazy then the startup failure can be handled during routing messages via Camel's routing error handlers. Beware that when the first message is processed then creating and starting the producer may take a little time and prolong the total processing time of the processing.

autowiredEnabled.label: advanced
autowiredEnabled.description: Whether autowiring is enabled. This is used for automatic autowiring options (the option must be marked as autowired) by looking up in the registry to find if there is a single instance of matching type, which then gets configured on the component. This can be used for automatic configuring JDBC data sources, JMS connection factories, AWS Clients, etc.

CamelClickHouseOperation.description: Overrides the operation configured on the endpoint (insert, query or ping).

CamelClickHouseDatabase.description: Overrides the target database configured on the endpoint.

CamelClickHouseTable.description: Overrides the target table configured on the endpoint.

CamelClickHouseFormat.description: Overrides the data format configured on the endpoint.

CamelClickHouseWrittenRows.description: The number of rows written by an insert operation.

CamelClickHouseReadRows.description: The number of rows read by a query operation.

CamelClickHousePingOk.description: The boolean result of a ping operation.

database.description: The ClickHouse database. A table may also be provided using the database.table syntax.

asyncInsert.description: Whether to use ClickHouse server-side asynchronous inserts (async_insert=1).

batchSize.description: The client-side batch size hint for insert operations. A value of 0 disables client-side batching (data is streamed as-is).

compression.description: Whether to compress the insert request payload sent to the server (LZ4).

format.description: The ClickHouse data format used for insert and query operations, e.g. JSONEachRow, RowBinary, CSV, TSV or Parquet.

operation.description: The operation to perform: insert, query or ping.

serverUrl.description: The ClickHouse HTTP endpoint URL, e.g. http://localhost:8123. Required unless a shared Client bean is autowired or configured on the component.

table.description: The target table for insert operations. Can also be given in the path as database.table or overridden per message with the CamelClickHouseTable header.

waitForAsyncInsert.description: When asyncInsert is enabled, whether the server should wait for the async insert to be flushed before acknowledging (wait_for_async_insert).

lazyStartProducer.label: producer,advanced
lazyStartProducer.description: Whether the producer should be started lazy (on the first message). By starting lazy you can use this to allow CamelContext and routes to startup in situations where a producer may otherwise fail during starting and cause the route to fail being started. By deferring this startup to be lazy then the startup failure can be handled during routing messages via Camel's routing error handlers. Beware that when the first message is processed then creating and starting the producer may take a little time and prolong the total processing time of the processing.

password.label: security
password.description: The password used to authenticate to ClickHouse.

ssl.label: security
ssl.description: Whether to connect to ClickHouse over a secure (HTTPS) connection.

username.label: security
username.description: The username used to authenticate to ClickHouse.
